'''loshabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labioglossopharyngeal|labioglossopharyngeal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-sh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labioglossopharyngeal|labioglossopharyngeal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| loshabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:loshabithi|loshabithi]] || [[word:loshabiji|loshabiji]] || [[word:loshabishi|loshabishi]] || [[word:loshabiki|loshabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:loshabuthuthu|loshabuthuthu]] || [[word:loshabujuju|loshabujuju]] || [[word:loshabushushu|loshabushushu]] || [[word:loshabukuku|loshabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:loshabuthu|loshabuthu]] || [[word:loshabuju|loshabuju]] || [[word:loshabushu|loshabushu]] || [[word:loshabuku|loshabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:loshabufthuf|loshabufthuf]] || [[word:loshabufjuf|loshabufjuf]] || [[word:loshabufshuf|loshabufshuf]] || [[word:loshabufkuf|loshabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:loshabethe|loshabethe]] || [[word:loshabeje|loshabeje]] || [[word:loshabeshe|loshabeshe]] || [[word:loshabeke|loshabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:loshabothotho|loshabothotho]] || [[word:loshabojojo|loshabojojo]] || [[word:loshaboshosho|loshaboshosho]] || [[word:loshabokoko|loshabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:loshabotho|loshabotho]] || [[word:loshabojo|loshabojo]] || [[word:loshabosho|loshabosho]] || [[word:loshaboko|loshaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:loshabofthof|loshabofthof]] || [[word:loshabofjof|loshabofjof]] || [[word:loshabofshof|loshabofshof]] || [[word:loshabofkof|loshabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:loshabĂŻfthĂŻf|loshabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:loshabĂŻfjĂŻf|loshabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:loshabĂŻfshĂŻf|loshabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:loshabĂŻfkĂŻf|loshabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:loshabĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|loshabĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:loshabĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|loshabĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:loshabĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|loshabĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:loshabĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|loshabĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:loshabĂŻfthĂŻf|loshabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:loshabĂŻfjĂŻf|loshabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:loshabĂŻfshĂŻf|loshabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:loshabĂŻfkĂŻf|loshabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:loshabĂŻfthĂŻf|loshabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:loshabĂŻfjĂŻf|loshabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:loshabĂŻfshĂŻf|loshabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:loshabĂŻfkĂŻf|loshabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:loshabĂŠthĂŠ|loshabĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:loshabĂŠjĂŠ|loshabĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:loshabĂŠshĂŠ|loshabĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:loshabĂŠkĂŠ|loshabĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:loshabathatha|loshabathatha]] || [[word:loshabajaja|loshabajaja]] || [[word:loshabashasha|loshabashasha]] || [[word:loshabakaka|loshabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:loshabatha|loshabatha]] || [[word:loshabaja|loshabaja]] || [[word:loshabasha|loshabasha]] || [[word:loshabaka|loshabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:loshabafthaf|loshabafthaf]] || [[word:loshabafjaf|loshabafjaf]] || [[word:loshabafshaf|loshabafshaf]] || [[word:loshabafkaf|loshabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:loshabasha|loshabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:loshabshĂ«sha|loshabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loshabrosha|loshabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loshabmusha|loshabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:loshabyasha|loshabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloshabnkshĂ«sha|goloshabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloshabnkrosha|goloshabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloshabnkmusha|goloshabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloshabnkyasha|goloshabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:loshashabasha|loshashabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:loshashabshĂ«sha|loshashabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loshashabrosha|loshashabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loshashabmusha|loshashabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:loshashabyasha|loshashabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloshashabnkshĂ«sha|goloshashabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloshashabnkrosha|goloshashabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloshashabnkmusha|goloshashabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloshashabnkyasha|goloshashabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:leshĂŠbasha|leshĂŠbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:leshĂŠbshĂ«sha|leshĂŠbshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:leshĂŠbrosha|leshĂŠbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:leshĂŠbmusha|leshĂŠbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:leshĂŠbyasha|leshĂŠbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goleshĂŠbnkshĂ«sha|goleshĂŠbnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goleshĂŠbnkrosha|goleshĂŠbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goleshĂŠbnkmusha|goleshĂŠbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goleshĂŠbnkyasha|goleshĂŠbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:loshfabasha|loshfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:loshfabshĂ«sha|loshfabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loshfabrosha|loshfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loshfabmusha|loshfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:loshfabyasha|loshfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloshfabnkshĂ«sha|goloshfabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloshfabnkrosha|goloshfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloshfabnkmusha|goloshfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloshfabnkyasha|goloshfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
